articles.title: Inside a rare lab that's blazing a bold trail as it hunts for new drugs - NPR
articles.description: A scientist from Zambia who loves — LOVES! — chemistry runs a lab in South Africa that is being hailed for "extraordinary" work.
articles.content:
Kelly Chibale
 says that the hunt for new drugs is kind of like a fairy-tale quest. And it takes a lot of time and patience. "It doesn't mean that there aren't surprises or miracles," he says. "They… [+9809 chars]
